text: Could you tell me what time your office opens and closes? Also, are you open on Saturdays?
The clinic is not open on Saturdays. If a point Orthopedics is open Monday through Friday, is there something else I can help you with?
What time do you open and close on weekdays?
Pivot Point Orthopedics is open from 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. on Monday Tuesday and Thursday from 12:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. on Wednesday and from 9 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. on Friday
Got it, thank you. So just to confirm, you're closed on Saturdays and have varying hours during the week. Thanks for the information! Goodbye.
